compatibilityLabel: React DOM 19.2.6 DOM style and dangerouslySetInnerHTML serialization and mutation oracle

generation.method: checked runtime inventory plus exact npm tarballs extracted into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per mode, scenario, and probe kind

probeModes.reason: Development mode records React DOM style/innerHTML output plus warnings and validation errors.
Production mode records style/innerHTML serialization and mutation output without development-only warnings.

scenarios.description: Style object serialization for normal CSS properties, numeric unit behavior, vendor prefixes, and CSS custom properties.
A two-phase update that mutates retained style values and clears removed normal and custom CSS properties.
Development diagnostics for invalid numeric style values and hyphenated style names.
React DOM rejects a string style prop instead of treating it as a raw CSS declaration.
Server and client output for a valid dangerouslySetInnerHTML payload.
A null __html payload is accepted and produces an empty host element.
Client updates replace assigned innerHTML and then switch back to managed children.
React DOM rejects a non-object dangerouslySetInnerHTML prop.
React DOM rejects an object without a __html key as dangerouslySetInnerHTML.
React DOM rejects host props that provide both children and dangerouslySetInnerHTML.

fakeDomSubstrate.purpose: exercise React DOM style and innerHTML mutation calls deterministically in Node without adding a DOM dependency to the conformance workspace
fakeDomSubstrate.browserAttributeNameNormalizationMode: HTML namespace setAttribute/removeAttribute names are lowercased by the fake DOM before final tree snapshots
doesNotModel: CSS parsing, cascade, computed styles, layout, focus, selection, and accessibility tree behavior
custom element lifecycle callbacks and browser upgrade timing
controlled form wrappers, selection restoration, and value tracking

args.value: `NaN` is an invalid value for the `%s` css style property.
`Infinity` is an invalid value for the `%s` css style property.
Unsupported style property %s. Did you mean %s?

error.name: Error
error.message: The `style` prop expects a mapping from style properties to values, not a string. For example, style={{marginRight: spacing + 'em'}} when using JSX.

intentionalGaps.reason: This oracle records pinned React DOM behavior only; Fast React React DOM mutation behavior is not implemented in this worker.

Client probes execute real React DOM 19.2.6 mutation code, but the DOM target is a deterministic fake DOM. The oracle records React DOM calls and final fake DOM state, not browser layout, parser, CSSOM, focus, or custom-element reactions.

Browser CSSOM parsing/cascade, native HTML parsing, controlled inputs/selects/textareas/forms, event delegation, SVG, MathML, hydration, resources, and server Fizz markers have separate oracle tracks or remain intentionally outside this deterministic fake-DOM probe.
